answers.decision: Registry covers major surfaces but needs finer companion subtype labels.
Authority boundaries are present; broad generated and markdown labels need sharper wording.
Generated outputs remain projection/trace material and are not primary evidence.
Target-exercise index is owned exercise evidence, not external authority.
R9.2 may proceed with projection edges by default and explicitly typed evidence edges only.

pattern_analysis: The answers approve R9.1 closure and R9.2 continuation while preserving evidence boundaries. Generated artifacts are not evidence, target exercises remain owned evidence, and R9.2 must make edge labels stricter.
targeted_followups: Add finer companion subtype labels in R9.2 or R9.3.
Strengthen generated-artifact warnings in content graph edge labels.
Keep projection, owned exercise evidence, external authority, and implementation trace as distinct edge classes.
